(416) MTHR PRESENT W/ATTY=A. SILVERMAN; FTHR PRESENT W/ATTY=K. GRUNDMAN; ADA=SAPORITO; COURT ORDERS THAT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: CONTEMPT BE DENIED AS NO CONTEMPT FOUND
; COURT ORDERS FTHR SHALL HAVE TEMPORARY SOLE PHYSICAL AND LEGAL CUSTODY OF CHILD OF ACTION; COURT SUSPENDS VISITATION EXCEPT BY WAY OF COUNSELING
ND PARENTS; SPECIFICALLY, QUESTION IS WHAT PSYCHOLOGICAL NEED DOES CHILD HAVE DUE TO HIS BELIEF OF ABUSE THAT OCCURRED; COURT WANTS PROFESSIONAL
EQUALLY SHARED BY MTHR AND FTHR; COURT FINDS CHILD IN FTHR'S CARE AND CUSTODY AND THAT FTHR SATISFIED SUPPORT OBLIGATION BY WAY OF DIRECT CARE AND
9; MTHR TO MAKE PAYMENTS DIRECTLY TO FTHR; SUPPORT FOR 8/99 TO BE DUE IN 10 DAYS AND SHALL BE DUE ON FIRST OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER; COURT RETAINS
ACH)  MATTER RECALLED AS PARTIES ARRIVED AT STIPULATION; ADA=SAPORITO NOT PRESENT; STIPULATION READ INTO RECORD FOR PERMANENT ORDER; FTHR TO HAVE SOLE
SUPPORT=$304.00/MN AND ONE-HALF OF ANY UNREIMBURSED MEDICAL EXPENSES; IF MTHR DOES SEEK CONTACT WITH CHILD, THEN ALL ORDERS MADE PREVIOUSLY TO GO INTO
ULATION AND ORDER. (SLABACH) PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY RICHARD BOTTO #5680
